name: Alaunos Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Alaunos Therapeutics is a preclinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel, orally administered small-molecule therapeutics for obesity and related metabolic disorders such as MASLD. The company has not generated any product revenue and has incurred significant net losses since inception. It previously operated as a clinical-stage oncology-focused cell therapy company but discontinued those programs in 2023.

exposures.sentence: We are a preclinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of novel, orally administered small-molecule therapeutics for obesity and related metabolic disorders, such as metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD, a type of fatty liver disease).

tamClaims.claim: The global obesity therapeutics market is projected to reach $150 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2026, analyst revisions now project the market reaching $150 billion by 2030, reflecting one of the fastest growth trajectories in pharmaceutical history.
